creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

I'm sorry, but you need to redo this port.  There's no 
MASTER_SITES, and it uses the older DISTNAME/PKGNAME 
convention that we no longer use or support.  Please update 
your ports collection and use portlint (see ports/devel/portlint) 
to make sure that your updated port works.  Thanks.
